nasb.text: Alas, you who are longing for the day of the Lord, For what purpose will the day of the Lord  be to you? It will be darkness and not light;

esv.text: Woe to you who desire the day of the Lord! Why would you have the day of the Lord? It is darkness, and not light,

cnv.text: 渴望耶和華日子來臨的人，你們有禍了！ 耶和華的日子對你們有甚麼好處呢？ 那日是黑暗，沒有光明的日子。

ccb.text: 盼望耶和华的日子到来的人有祸了！ 你们为什么盼望耶和华的日子呢？ 那日将带来黑暗，而非光明。
